title: Remove images from Cute Accessories section

requirements.summary: Remove all product images from the Cute Accessories page, including the earring gallery thumbnail switcher, while preserving text-based product information and adjusting layout cleanly
acceptanceCriteria: The Cute Accessories page renders with no images in any product card.
The earring gallery thumbnail switcher component is removed.
No broken image elements or empty image containers remain visible.
All other product information (name, price, tags, add-to-cart) remains intact.
Layout of product cards adjusts cleanly without the image space.

file_operations.description: Remove all image rendering logic from product cards, including the earring gallery thumbnail switcher and any img elements. Remove all references to generated earring images (frontend/public/assets/generated/earring-*.dim_600x600.png) and the cute-accessories-hero image. Ensure product cards display only text content (name, description, price, tags, add-to-cart button) and adjust the card layout to work without image containers. Remove any useState hooks managing thumbnail selection or gallery state.
